rationale: The parent process (cmd.exe) executed multiple curl commands (A0, EV-002, EV-004, EV-006) to download a DLL file from GitHub to various suspicious locations, including C:\Users\Public\Music, C:\ProgramData, and the user's Temp directory (EV-001, EV-003, EV-005, EV-007). This behavior is indicative of a malicious download and potential persistence attempt.
